tool.name: EnzyWizard Flexibility
tool.description: Estimate protein flexibility from a cleaned protein structure
tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Flexibility**
Estimates protein flexibility by computing per-residue root mean square fluctuation (RMSF) values using elastic network models (ANM or GNM) implemented in ProDy.
**Inputs** - Cleaned protein structure in CIF or PDB format.
**Outputs** - JSON report with RMSF values.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-flexibility` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-flexibility
